remember: Students will be able to recall different types of body fluids, their composition, and functions.
Students will be able to identify the major components of blood and their functions.
Students will be able to describe the structure and function of the blood vessels, heart, and lymphatic system.
understand: Students will be able to explain the process of blood circulation and its regulation.
Students will be able to describe the role of the heart in blood circulation and its different chambers.
Students will be able to explain the concept of cardiac output and its measurement.
apply: Students will be able to explain the concept of blood pressure and its measurement.
Students will be able to describe the role of the blood vessels in regulating blood pressure.
Students will be able to explain the concept of cardiac output and its measurement.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the factors affecting blood circulation and their impact on the body.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different types of blood circulation systems in various organisms.
Students will be able to evaluate the importance of blood circulation in maintaining homeostasis in the body.

ncert_objectives: To describe the structure and function of blood and its components.
To explain the process of blood circulation and its regulation.
To describe the role of the heart and blood vessels in blood circulation.
To explain the concept of blood pressure and its measurement.
To describe the lymphatic system and its role in the body.
board_exam_objectives: To recall the major components of blood and their functions (Class 11 Biology CBSE Board Exam).
To describe the structure and function of the blood vessels, heart, and lymphatic system (Class 11 Biology CBSE Board Exam).
To explain the process of blood circulation and its regulation (Class 11 Biology CBSE Board Exam).
To calculate the cardiac output and blood pressure (Class 11 Biology CBSE Board Exam).
